cub_correlation.hypothesis: Negative correlation: frequently used codons have lower local Grantham mismatch cost (sit in 'good' neighborhoods)
cub_correlation.interpretation: rho = 0.001, p = 0.9925. No significant correlation detected.

mechanistic_discriminant.hypothesis: Topology-breaking reassignments involve smaller physicochemical jumps than topology-preserving ones (supports codon capture model)
mechanistic_discriminant.interpretation: Breaking: mean Grantham=92.8, Miyata=1.18 (n=5); Preserving: mean Grantham=93.1, Miyata=1.67 (n=8). Direction consistent across metrics (breaking < preserving under Miyata: 1.18 vs 1.67) but underpowered (n=5 vs 8; breaking events are dominated by a single codon box CUU/CUC/CUA/CUG in the CUG clade). Mann-Whitney p=0.103 — cannot distinguish mechanism.
